name: Onion Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a 6-inch square of heavy-duty foil.
2. Place all ingredients in the center of the foil.
3. Fold the foil to make an airtight package.
4. Label with date and contents.
5. Store in a dry, cool place.
6. Use within 6 months.
Makes 1 package Onion Seasoning Mix. Use this mix whenever your recipe calls for dried onion soup mix. You may store this mix in empty bouillon jars, baby food jars, or small gift jelly jars.
